name: Fool-Proof Basic French Bread
recipeInstructions:
1. In a bowl, mix the flour and salt.
2. Add water to the mixture and stir until combined.
3. Dissolve the yeast in warm water (if using instant yeast, add it directly to the flour).
4. Combine the yeast with the flour mixture.
5. Knead the dough on a floured surface until smooth.
6. Place the dough in a greased pan or Dutch oven.
7. Cover and let rise until doubled in size.
8. Bake at 425°F (220°C) for about 30 minutes, or until golden brown.
9. Remove from the oven and cool on a wire rack.
Variations:
- Add any of the following to the bottom of the measuring cup: 1 tablespoon dried onionsoup mix OR 1 tablespoon each of dried herbs (dill weed, basil, parsley, etc.), OR 2 tablespoons grated dry cheese (cheddar, parmesan, romano, etc.). Fill up with flour and mix.
